fullName.display: 维尔蒂萨瑟吉尔希·梅亨

backstory.original: Mehen's life changed three times: once when he was exiled from the dragonborn stronghold of Djerad Thymar for refusing to be his tyrannical father's puppet; once when he took in twin tiefling babies abandoned in the snow; and once when his teenaged daughter, Farideh, made a pact with a devil from the Nine Hells. But Mehen is both adaptable and resilient; nothing out there will break his love for his daughters, his sense of self, or the strike of his falchion.
backstory.display: 梅亨的生活发生过三次改变：一次是因为拒绝做他暴虐父亲的傀儡，而被流放出龙裔要塞杰拉德·提玛尔城；一次是他收留了被遗弃在雪地上的双胞胎提夫林婴儿；还有一次是他青春期的女儿法莉德，与来自九层地狱的魔鬼签订了契约。但梅亨既能适应，又有韧性--外面的一切都无法影响他对女儿们的爱，他的自我的意识，以及他弯刀的攻击。

description.original: Mehen leaps out and attacks a random enemy, swinging down and then up, scoring a hit each time.
description.display: 梅亨跃向前方攻击一名随机敌人，武器上下挥舞各自造成一次伤害。

longDescription.original: Mehen leaps out and attacks a random enemy, swinging down and then up with a second swing, scoring a hit each time.
longDescription.display: 梅亨跃向前方攻击一名随机敌人，武器先向下然后再向上挥舞，各自造成一次伤害。

description.original: Mehen breathes a cone of lightning that hits and potentially stuns all enemies.
description.display: 梅亨喷出一道锥形闪电，击中并可能击晕所有敌人。

longDescription.original: Mehen breathes a cone of lightning that hits all enemies in the area. If it hits more than 5 enemies, or a boss, it stuns all enemies for 10 seconds.
longDescription.display: 梅亨喷出一道锥形闪电，击中区域中的所有敌人。如果有 5 名敌人或 1 个首领被击中，所有敌人会被击晕 10 秒。

description.desc: When Mehen is in the formation, Farideh and Havilar become eligible for the current adventure, even if a Patron, Variant, or other restriction would say otherwise.
当梅亨处于阵型中时，即使赞助者、支线任务或其他限制另有规定，法莉德和哈维拉也有资格参与当前冒险。

Mehen gains a stack of Grumpy for each of the following checks that is met. He increases the damage of all Champions in the formation by $amount% for each stack of Grumpy he has, stacking multiplicatively.

effect_keys.condition_description: Adjacent to Farideh
At least two columns behind Havilar
At the top of the column
At least three Champions in the column(s) in front of him
At least two Champions in the column(s) behind him
Adjacent to Champions with an average base attack cooldown of 5 seconds or less
Adjacent to at least two Tiefling or Dragonborn Champions
At least one other Tiefling or Dragonborn in his column
Within 2 slots of Champions with at least 4 unique classes
Within 2 slots of Champions with at least 6 unique roles

description.desc: 梅亨每满足一项以下的条件，他就会获得一层“暴躁”层数。他每拥有一层“暴躁”层数，他会使阵型中所有勇士的伤害提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

effect_keys.condition_description: 毗邻法莉德
哈维拉身后至少两列
在一列的顶部
至少有三名勇士在他的前列
至少有两名勇士在他的后列
毗邻平均基本攻击冷却时间小于等于 5 秒的勇士
毗邻至少两名提夫林或龙裔勇士
至少有另一名提夫林或龙裔勇士与他同列
距离有着至少 4 种不同职业的勇士不超过 2 格
距离有着至少 6 种不同角色定位的勇士不超过 2 格

tipText.original: Mehen gets more powerful if you meet the positional requirements for his Grumpy ability.
tipText.display: 如果你满足了梅亨“暴躁”技能的位置要求，他将变得更加强大。

description.desc: When a monster tries to attack any Champion in the formation for the first time, the damage is prevented and the monster is stunned for $stun_duration seconds and takes $amount% more damage during this time. If the attacked Champion is Havilar, the duration is $buffed_stun_duration seconds instead.
当一个敌人第一次试图攻击阵型中的任何勇士时，其伤害会被阻挡，而且该敌人会眩晕 $stun_duration 秒，并在此期间多受到 $amount% 的伤害。如果被攻击的勇士是哈维拉，怪物眩晕的时间将为 $buffed_stun_duration 秒。

tipText.original: Some of Mehen's abilities have special effects if Havilar and Farideh are in the formation.
tipText.display: 如果哈维拉和法莉德在阵型中，梅亨的一些技能会有特殊效果。

description.desc: Mehen increases Gold Find of the formation by $amount% for every stack of Grumpy that he has, stacking multiplicatively.
梅亨每拥有一层“暴躁”层数，他会使阵型的金币寻获量提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠。

When a Champion adjacent to Mehen applies a stun, berserk, knockback, slow, or root, the enemy takes $amount% more damage for $debuff_duration seconds. If Farideh is adjacent to Mehen, she prioritizes attacking those enemies. This debuff does not stack, but the duration is extended if it applies again before it expires.
当与梅亨相邻的一名勇士施放眩晕、发狂、击退、减速或定身效果时，敌人在 $debuff_duration 秒内多受到 $amount% 的伤害。如果法莉德与梅亨相邻，她会优先攻击这些敌人。此减益不会堆叠，但如果在失效前再次施放，持续时间会延长。
Mehen increases the effect of Grumpy by $amount% for each DPS Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and applying to the post-stack value.
阵型中每有一位伤害输出型勇士，梅亨会使“暴躁”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠，并且会应用于堆叠后的数值。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Mehen rallies a fearsome crew of hard-hitting heroes.
specializationDescription.display: 梅亨召集了一支令人生畏的队伍，其成员都是冲击力强劲的英雄。

description.desc: Mehen increases the effect of Grumpy by $amount% for each Champion in the formation who is 20 years old or younger, stacking multiplicatively and applying to the post-stack value.
阵型中每有一位年龄小于等于 20 岁的勇士，梅亨会使“暴躁”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠，并且会应用于堆叠后的数值。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Mehen supports promising young adventurers, guiding them with the same wisdom that shaped his adopted daughters.
specializationDescription.display: 梅亨会支持有前途的年轻冒险者，用智慧引导他们，他曾经用同样的智慧培养了他的养女。

description.desc: Mehen increases the effect of Grumpy by $amount% for each Dragonborn Champion in the formation, stacking multiplicatively and applying to the post-stack value. Farideh and Havilar both gain the Dragonborn species when this spec is chosen.
阵型中每有一位龙裔勇士，梅亨会使“暴躁”的效果提高 $amount%，以乘算方式堆叠，并且会应用于堆叠后的数值。当此项专精被选中时，法莉德和哈维拉都会算作龙裔。

properties.spec_option_post_apply_info: 阵型中的目标勇士数量：$num_stacks___2

specializationDescription.original: Mehen embraces his role as a father by welcoming Farideh and Havilar fully into his Dragonborn family.
specializationDescription.display: 梅亨接受了他作为父亲的角色，完全把法莉德和哈维拉接纳进了他的龙裔家庭。

description.original: If you mean willing to take a hit, yeah. That's me.
description.display: 如果这是指愿意挨揍的话，那我的确算是很无私。

description.original: Blades out, eyes up, spells ready and don't get cocky!
description.display: 拔剑，抬头，法术就绪，不要骄傲！

description.original: Keep your eyes on the road ahead!
description.display: 都打起精神，注意前方的危险！

description.original: Count your coins before you store your pouch. There are those we can't trust among us.
description.display: 在存放你的钱袋之前，要数一下你的钱币。我们当中有一些不可信的人。

description.original: If I have to come up there, I swear I'll turn this caravan around.
description.display: 你要是连这点事情都办不好，我就取消行程让车队原路折返。

description.original: We'll just call it an extra bounty.
description.display: 我们都称之为额外的赏金。

description.original: People always need sellswords.
description.display: 人人都需要雇佣兵。

description.original: I've fought tougher battles in my sleep. Let's end this quickly.
description.display: 我在睡梦中打的仗都要比这难。我们快点结束战斗吧。

description.original: Keep your wits about you. You never know who you'll run into here.
description.display: 保持冷静。你永远不知道会遇到谁。

description.original: You don't scare easily, do you? I can fix that.
description.display: 你轻易不会被吓到，对吧？我可以治你这毛病。

effects.description: Increases the duration of Mehen's Intimidating Presence ability by 80%.

description.original: Where my girls go, I go.
description.display: 我的宝贝女儿去哪，我就去哪。

effects.description: Mehen also counts as a Tiefling

description.original: Gold's no use to you if you're dead. Since I'm here, that won't happen.
description.display: 如果你死了，金子对你来说就没用了。有我在，那样的事不会发生。

description.original: I've seen a thousand battles, and I'll see a thousand more.
description.display: 我目睹过上千场战斗，而且我还将目睹上千场。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Mehen's specializations by $amount%

description.original: You don't survive long in my line of work without learning exactly where to strike.
description.display: 干我这行，你不知道打哪里的话活不了多久的。

description.original: Watch how they move. They put too much weight on one side. Sweep the leg.
description.display: 看看他们是怎么移动的。他们把太多的重量放在了一侧。扫他的腿。

description.original: The moment they slip, you strike. If you miss, that's your problem.
description.display: 他们滑倒的那一刻，你就出击。如果你失手了，那就是你的问题。

effects.description: Increases the duration of Mehen's Expose Weakness ability by 80%.

description.original: I've seen enough battles to know how this ends. Watch and learn.
description.display: 我见过太多的战斗了，我知道这会如何终结。好好看，好好学。

effects.description: Increases the effect of Mehen's specializations by $amount%

description.original: What are you wearing? Actually, I don't care. Just stay alive.
description.display: 你穿的那是什么啊？事实上，我并不在乎。你只要别死了就行。

effects.condition_description: Adjacent to at least 2 Champions with skins equipped
effects.description: Add the following check to Mehen's Grumpy ability: ^Adjacent to at least 2 Champions with skins equipped

description.original: You fight like family, or close enough.
description.display: 你们要像家人或足够亲密的人一样战斗。

effects.condition_description: Only Tiefling and/or Dragonborn Champions in Mehen's column
effects.description: Add the following check to Mehen's Grumpy ability: ^Only Tiefling and/or Dragonborn Champions in Mehen's column

description.original: Sometimes you just have to burn everything in your way.
description.display: 有时候你不得不把阻挡你去路的一切都烧掉。

description.original: I'm certain of few things in this life. Disappointment is one of them.
description.display: I'm certain of few things in this life. Disappointment is one of them.

character_sheet_details.backstory: Mehen's life changed three times: once when he was exiled from the dragonborn stronghold of Djerad Thymar for refusing to be his tyrannical father's puppet; once when he took in twin tiefling babies abandoned in the snow; and once when his teenaged daughter, Farideh, made a pact with a devil from the Nine Hells. But Mehen is both adaptable and resilient; nothing out there will break his love for his daughters, his sense of self, or the strike of his falchion.
character_sheet_details.system_description: Mehen is a Support, Gold Find, and Debuff Champion who is the adoptive father of Farideh and Havilar. As an experienced fighter, Mehen's power grows quickly when his Grumpy demands are met.

character_sheet_details.full_name: 维尔蒂萨瑟吉尔希·梅亨
character_sheet_details.backstory: 梅亨的生活发生过三次改变：一次是因为拒绝做他暴虐父亲的傀儡，而被流放出龙裔要塞杰拉德·提玛尔城；一次是他收留了被遗弃在雪地上的双胞胎提夫林婴儿；还有一次是他青春期的女儿法莉德，与来自九层地狱的魔鬼签订了契约。但梅亨既能适应，又有韧性--外面的一切都无法影响他对女儿们的爱，他的自我的意识，以及他弯刀的攻击。
character_sheet_details.system_description: 梅亨是一名支援型、金币寻获和减益勇士，也是法莉德和哈维拉的养父。作为一名经验丰富的战士，当梅亨的“暴躁”要求得到满足时，他的力量会迅速增长。

original.name: Double Strike
original.description: Mehen leaps out and attacks a random enemy, swinging down and then up, scoring a hit each time.
original.long_description: Mehen leaps out and attacks a random enemy, swinging down and then up with a second swing, scoring a hit each time.

display.name: 双重打击
display.description: 梅亨跃向前方攻击一名随机敌人，武器上下挥舞各自造成一次伤害。
display.long_description: 梅亨跃向前方攻击一名随机敌人，武器先向下然后再向上挥舞，各自造成一次伤害。

original.name: Lightning Breath
original.description: Mehen breathes a cone of lightning that hits and potentially stuns all enemies.
original.long_description: Mehen breathes a cone of lightning that hits all enemies in the area. If it hits more than 5 enemies, or a boss, it stuns all enemies for 10 seconds.

display.name: 闪电吐息
display.description: 梅亨喷出一道锥形闪电，击中并可能击晕所有敌人。
display.long_description: 梅亨喷出一道锥形闪电，击中区域中的所有敌人。如果有 5 名敌人或 1 个首领被击中，所有敌人会被击晕 10 秒。

original.name: Grumpy
original.tip_text: Mehen gets more powerful if you meet the positional requirements for his Grumpy ability.

display.name: 暴躁
display.tip_text: 如果你满足了梅亨“暴躁”技能的位置要求，他将变得更加强大。

original.name: Intimidating Presence
original.tip_text: Some of Mehen's abilities have special effects if Havilar and Farideh are in the formation.

display.name: 令人生畏的存在
display.tip_text: 如果哈维拉和法莉德在阵型中，梅亨的一些技能会有特殊效果。

original.name: Fighting Force
original.specialization_description: Mehen rallies a fearsome crew of hard-hitting heroes.

display.name: 战斗队伍
display.specialization_description: 梅亨召集了一支令人生畏的队伍，其成员都是冲击力强劲的英雄。

original.name: Father Figure
original.specialization_description: Mehen supports promising young adventurers, guiding them with the same wisdom that shaped his adopted daughters.

display.name: 父亲般的人物
display.specialization_description: 梅亨会支持有前途的年轻冒险者，用智慧引导他们，他曾经用同样的智慧培养了他的养女。

original.name: Found Family
original.specialization_description: Mehen embraces his role as a father by welcoming Farideh and Havilar fully into his Dragonborn family.

display.name: 建立家庭
display.specialization_description: 梅亨接受了他作为父亲的角色，完全把法莉德和哈维拉接纳进了他的龙裔家庭。

original.name: Battle-Hardened
original.description: I've fought tougher battles in my sleep. Let's end this quickly.

display.name: 身经百战
display.description: 我在睡梦中打的仗都要比这难。我们快点结束战斗吧。

original.name: Draconic Glare
original.description: You don't scare easily, do you? I can fix that.

display.name: 龙之怒视
display.description: 你轻易不会被吓到，对吧？我可以治你这毛病。

effects.description: 使梅亨“令人生畏的存在”技能的持续时间增加 80%。

original.name: Golden Wisdom
original.description: Gold's no use to you if you're dead. Since I'm here, that won't happen.

display.name: 黄金智慧
display.description: 如果你死了，金子对你来说就没用了。有我在，那样的事不会发生。

original.name: Fierce Fighter
original.description: I've seen a thousand battles, and I'll see a thousand more.

effects.description: Increases the effect of Mehen's specializations by $amount%

display.name: 凶猛战士
display.description: 我目睹过上千场战斗，而且我还将目睹上千场。

effects.description: 使梅亨的专精效果提高 $amount%

display.name: 经验丰富的领导者
display.description: 我见过太多的战斗了，我知道这会如何终结。好好看，好好学。

effects.description: 使梅亨的专精效果提高 $amount%

original.name: Exploit Weakness
original.description: The moment they slip, you strike. If you miss, that's your problem.

effects.description: Increases the duration of Mehen's Expose Weakness ability by 80%.

display.name: 利用弱点

effects.description: 使梅亨“暴露弱点”技能的持续时间增加 80%。

original.name: Fashionably Grumpy
original.description: What are you wearing? Actually, I don't care. Just stay alive.

effects.condition_description: Adjacent to at least 2 Champions with skins equipped
effects.description: Add the following check to Mehen's Grumpy ability: ^Adjacent to at least 2 Champions with skins equipped

display.name: 时髦地暴躁
display.description: 你穿的那是什么啊？事实上，我并不在乎。你只要别死了就行。

effects.condition_description: Adjacent to at least 2 Champions with skins equipped
effects.description: 为梅亨的“暴躁”技能增加以下条件：^与至少 2 名装备了皮肤的勇士相邻

original.name: Scale & Horn
original.description: You fight like family, or close enough.

effects.condition_description: Only Tiefling and/or Dragonborn Champions in Mehen's column
effects.description: Add the following check to Mehen's Grumpy ability: ^Only Tiefling and/or Dragonborn Champions in Mehen's column

display.name: 鳞与角
display.description: 你们要像家人或足够亲密的人一样战斗。

effects.condition_description: Only Tiefling and/or Dragonborn Champions in Mehen's column
effects.description: 为梅亨的“暴躁”技能增加以下条件：^仅限处于梅亨所在列中的提夫林和/或龙裔勇士

original.name: Scorched Earth
original.description: Sometimes you just have to burn everything in your way.

display.name: 被烧焦的土地
display.description: 有时候你不得不把阻挡你去路的一切都烧掉。

original.name: Frugal
original.description: Count your coins before you store your pouch. There are those we can't trust among us.

display.name: 节俭
display.description: 在存放你的钱袋之前，要数一下你的钱币。我们当中有一些不可信的人。

original.name: Guaranteed Grump
original.description: I'm certain of few things in this life. Disappointment is one of them.

display.name: Guaranteed Grump
display.description: I'm certain of few things in this life. Disappointment is one of them.
